ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { message: "🎉 Hello, Beautiful World! 🌟", greeting: "Welcome to this wonderful moment! ✨", mood: "Absolutely fantastic! 😊", timestamp: now(), formattedDate: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"}, formattedTime: now() as String {format: "HH:mm:ss"}, formattedDateTime: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"}, dayOfWeek: now() as String {format: "EEEE"}, encouragement: "You're doing amazing! Keep shining! 🌈✨", funFact: "This response was generated with extra joy and sparkles! 🎊" }
